role_title: Program Manager - Assistant Vice President / Vice President
secondary_archetype: Program Manager with Product Operations focus

seniority.level: AVP / VP (Senior IC, likely equivalent to Senior or Staff PM)
level_signals: Expected to partner directly with product and engineering leadership
Operates with minimal direction and independently owns problems

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 7-10+ years of relevant experience within program management, project management, or business analysis roles
Proven experience delivering multiple complex, technically deep software projects simultaneously in financial services or fintech environments

Demonstrated ability to partner directly with product and engineering leadership, understanding product strategy, technical architecture, sprint mechanics, and delivery tradeoffs well enough to co-own outcomes, not just track them
Experience working effectively with globally distributed teams
Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to influence and align diverse stakeholders
Able to operate independently with minimal direction and take direct ownership of problems from identification through resolution
Demonstrated ability to manage ambiguity, prioritize competing demands, and operate with a risk management mindset
Deep understanding of Agile methodologies and advanced proficiency across the full toolset (i.e. Monday.com, JIRA, and Confluence)

Serve as a power user and operational owner of Monday.com, designing and maintaining boards, dashboards, automations, and workflows that drive transparency, accountability, and timely delivery across teams.

Maintain deep operational fluency in JIRA and Confluence, actively using JIRA for sprint-level tracking, backlog management, and engineering alignment, and Confluence for documentation, decision logs, and durable program artifacts.
Operational rigor with a focus on process improvement, workload distribution, and team enablement

Hands-on experience with AI productivity tools, specifically Microsoft 365 Copilot (for email, Teams, document drafting, and meeting synthesis) and Anthropic Claude (for analysis, summarization, and operational content generation)
Comfort experimenting with AI-assisted workflows to improve team velocity, reduce manual overhead, and enhance the quality of executive-facing deliverables

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: PMP, SAFe, CSM, or CSP certifications are a plus

scope.surface: Pre-Investment vertical within Product Operations; multiple concurrent complex software development initiatives
primary_metrics_inferred: On-time delivery of strategic software initiatives
Program efficiency and process improvement metrics
core_responsibilities: Own and drive end-to-end delivery of multiple concurrent strategic software initiatives across the Pre-Investment vertical
Build trusted relationships with product and engineering leads and co-own delivery outcomes
Lead cross-functional collaboration across distributed, multi-location teams
Develop and maintain detailed project plans, milestones, dependencies, and risk mitigation strategies
Diagnose root causes, drive resolution directly, and escalate when necessary
Serve as power user and operational owner of Monday.com
Maintain deep operational fluency in JIRA and Confluence
Prepare and present project status reports, dashboards, and performance metrics to leadership
Facilitate decision-making forums and working sessions
Leverage AI tools including Microsoft Copilot and Anthropic Claude to accelerate operational workflows

compensation.equity_form: equity for all full-time employees (form not specified)

green_flags: Equity offered to all full-time employees
Comprehensive benefits including 100% employer-paid dental, vision, telemedicine, and mental health
Hybrid schedule clearly defined (Mon-Thu in office, Fri remote)
Role has clear ownership scope within a defined vertical (Pre-Investment)
Specific tooling expectations spelled out (Monday.com, JIRA, Confluence, Copilot, Claude)
red_flags: 4 days/week in-office requirement (Mon-Thu) limits flexibility for fully remote candidates
No city listed in JD body — office location is not specified, creating ambiguity for candidates evaluating commute feasibility
7-10+ years range combined with AVP/VP title may indicate wide leveling uncertainty or budget constraints
Visa sponsorship not addressed in the JD

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title range, years, and comp)
scope.business_model (inferred from iCapital's known positioning as B2B alternative investment platform)
location.cities_listed (no city named in JD body; left empty)
ambiguities: Role title spans two levels (AVP and VP) without clear differentiation criteria for which level will be offered
No city or office location is mentioned in the JD body; the hybrid policy is described but the office location is unknown to the reader
Years range stated as '7-10+' — the '+' after 10 makes the upper bound open-ended; minimum set to 7
